questions.question: What is the shape contract for a causal LM training batch?
options: (B, T) input ids and (B, T) target ids where target is the input shifted left by one
(B, V) one-hot vectors over the vocabulary
(B, T, T) attention masks with the input ids on the diagonal
(B, 2) input id and label pairs
questions.explanation: Causal LM training reads (B, T) input ids and predicts the same shape of target ids, where target[t] = input[t+1].
questions.question_zh: 因果 LM 训练 batch 的 shape 契约是什么?
options_zh: (B, T) 的 input id 与 (B, T) 的 target id,target 是 input 整体左移一位
在词表上的 (B, V) one-hot 向量
(B, T, T) 的 attention mask,对角线上是 input id
(B, 2) 的 (input id, label) 对
questions.explanation_zh: 因果 LM 训练读 (B, T) input id,预测同样形状的 target id,其中 target[t] = input[t+1]。

questions.question: How many windows of length T+1 fit in an id stream of length N with stride S?
options: (N - T) * S
N - T - S
questions.explanation: The first window starts at 0. Subsequent windows start at multiples of S. The last window must still cover T+1 ids.
questions.question_zh: 在长度为 N 的 id 流上,以 stride S 切出长度 T+1 的窗口,共有多少个?
options_zh: (N - T) * S
N - T - S
questions.explanation_zh: 第一个窗口起点是 0,后续窗口起点是 S 的倍数。最后一个窗口仍需覆盖 T+1 个 id。

questions.question: What effect does halving the stride have on the dataset?
options: It halves the number of training examples per epoch
It roughly doubles the number of training examples per epoch
It has no effect because windows never overlap
It removes overlap between consecutive windows
questions.explanation: A smaller stride produces more overlapping windows, increasing the example count and the boundary diversity at the cost of more compute per epoch.
questions.question_zh: 把 stride 减半对数据集有什么影响?
options_zh: 把每个 epoch 的训练样本数减半
把每个 epoch 的训练样本数大约翻倍
没有影响,因为窗口从不重叠
去掉相邻窗口之间的重叠
questions.explanation_zh: 更小的 stride 产生更多重叠窗口,增加样本数和边界多样性,代价是每个 epoch 更多算力。

questions.question: Why pass an explicit torch.Generator to the DataLoader?
options: It speeds up data loading
It removes the need for batch padding
It makes the shuffle deterministic across runs with the same seed
It enables multi-GPU training
questions.explanation: A seeded generator reproduces the same shuffle. Reruns with the same seed see batches in the same order, which is required for fair hyperparameter comparison.
questions.question_zh: 为什么向 DataLoader 显式传入 torch.Generator?
options_zh: 加快数据加载
省去 batch padding
在相同 seed 下让 shuffle 跨次运行保持确定性
启用多 GPU 训练
questions.explanation_zh: 带 seed 的 generator 复现同样的 shuffle。相同 seed 的多次运行看到的 batch 顺序相同,这是公平比较超参的前提。

questions.question: Why does the dataset return (input[:-1], input[1:]) from each window of size T+1?
options: It throws away one id to save memory
It implements the shift-by-one target so the loss measures next-token prediction
It removes a special token from the input
It is a quirk of PyTorch tensor indexing
questions.explanation: The target at position t is the input at position t+1. Slicing the window into [:-1] and [1:] expresses that contract.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 dataset 从每个长度 T+1 的窗口里返回 (input[:-1], input[1:])?
options_zh: 为了节省内存,丢掉一个 id
实现 shift-by-one 的 target,使 loss 衡量下一个 token 的预测
为了从 input 中移除一个 special token
这是 PyTorch 张量索引的怪癖
questions.explanation_zh: 位置 t 的 target 是位置 t+1 的 input。把窗口切成 [:-1] 和 [1:] 就表达了这一契约。

questions.question: Why does the lesson drop incomplete trailing windows rather than padding them?
options: Padding would change the vocabulary size
Dropping keeps every example the same length so no loss mask is needed
Padded tokens are not supported by the model
Dropped data is recovered by the next epoch
questions.explanation: All examples are exactly T tokens long by construction, so the batch is a clean rectangular tensor and the loss applies uniformly without a mask.
questions.question_zh: 为什么本节丢弃不完整的尾部窗口而不是 padding?
options_zh: padding 会改变词表大小
丢弃使每个样本长度相同,无需 loss mask
模型不支持 padded token
丢掉的数据会在下个 epoch 找回
questions.explanation_zh: 由于结构上每个样本恰好为 T 个 token,batch 是干净的矩形张量,loss 可均匀应用,无需 mask。
